meaning: n.马杜克(古代巴比伦人的主神,原为巴比伦的太阳神)
examples: Marduk defeats Tiamat, the watery ferocious deep monster.
In theory the king was no more than an agent of Marduk.
The Mesopotamians believed in many gods, and as their chief god - Marduk.
It describes how Cyrus was able to defeat the Babylonian king Nabonidus with the aid of the Babylonian god Marduk, who had run out of patience with Nabonidus and his shortcomings.
